_comment: Village NPCs. pos = world [x,z]. dialogue lines are data-driven; the Elder uses conditional lines keyed by aura tier + dominant element (game.js picks the matching one, falling back to default).

npcs.name: Village Elder
npcs.role: Introduces cultivation, reacts to your awakening, opens the path.

default: So the Dao Tree has chosen you, child. I felt the qi stir from my hearth.
Your aura is the measure of your *potential* — not your strength today. Even a Red-aura mortal has toppled White-aura geniuses through nothing but stubborn effort.
Prove it. Beyond the bridge lies the Whispering Forest — gather three spirit herbs, and beware the beast that stalks there.

byAura.white: White aura... in all my years I have never seen it. The heavens themselves are watching you. Do not let it make you arrogant — potential unspent is worth nothing.
byAura.purple: Purple qi from the east — a genius's mark. The sects will come sniffing soon enough.
byAura.red: A Red aura. Humble beginnings. Good — the diligent red flame outlasts the lazy white star. I have seen it happen.

byElement.fire: A Fire root — destruction and forging both. The Alchemist will want words with you.
byElement.water: Water flows and endures. A patient Dao. It suits the long road ahead.
byElement.gold: A Gold root — the sword's own element. The Blacksmith's craft will call to you.
byElement.wood: Wood — life and growth. The herbs of the forest will answer your hand.
byElement.earth: Earth — the unmoving mountain. Few can break a cultivator of your foundation.

npcs.name: Alchemist Bai
npcs.role: Herbs, pills, and the first Foundation Pill.

default: Herbs, pills, poisons — I trade in all three. Bring me spirit herbs and I will refine you a Foundation Pill.
No, you need not hunt a high Heavenly Fire yet — our village flame will do for a mortal's first pill. That reckoning comes later.
A cultivator without a blade is half a cultivator. This iron sword is cheap — take it.
Higher grades need spirit steel and a true Heavenly Fire. Come back when you've the qi to wield them.
Spirit stones for goods, goods for spirit stones — the oldest Dao of all!
Gather anything you don't need and I'll give you a fair price. Fair-ish.
The great sects watch the Dao Tree's choosings. Aura, element, destiny — all decide which gate will open to you.
Build your name. When your reputation reaches us, the entrance examinations will follow. For now — grow.
